response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video for vocal music. The video consists of a promotional introduction for the 'hololive English 3rd Concert: ALL FOR ONE' and subsequent introductions of the different talent groups (Myth, Promise, Advent, Justice). The audio throughout is high-energy instrumental production music used for concert hype and transitions. No vocal songs with lyrics were detected, therefore no web searches for lyrics were performed.
response.global_summary: A promotional concert introduction video featuring high-energy instrumental production music, crowd shots, and visual introductions for different talent groups (Myth, Promise, Advent, and Justice) for the 'hololive English 3rd Concert: ALL FOR ONE'. No vocal songs with lyrics were detected.

scenes.description: Concert branding animations, stage lighting, and venue shots, accompanied by instrumental hype music.
Sequential visual introductions of the hololive English groups (Myth, Promise, Advent, Justice) with instrumental hype music.
